query: Order Status or Delivery Status check.
steps: Search in Shopify with Order ID OR Registered Contact number.
You will find tracking details. Click on the tracking number.
Open tracking and view estimated date of delivery.

query: Why is my order late? Or if the customer did not receive the order on the estimated time date.
steps: Open the tracking link, check the status.
If in transit, inform him the actual EDD.
If EDD has passed, inform us for further process.
If shows any other reason (delayed due to natural calamity OR Damaged in transit etc.) inform the us to check the same from our side.
No shipping charges on pre-paid order Above 250.
In case order value is below 250 then minimal INR 25 Shipping charges get applied. (COD & Pre-Paid)
Check in Shopify, if order is not shipped, inform us to cancel it.
If order Is shipped, We Can't Cancel it, ask customer to Refuse At The Time Of Delivery.
Check in Shopify, if order is not shipped, inform us to cancel it.
If order Is shipped, We Can't Cancel it, ask customer to Refuse At The Time Of Delivery.  We Will Initiate Refund, Once The Order Is Marked As Returned.
